title: Contact Us
subtitle: We're here to help
description: Have any questions? We'd love to hear from you. Contact us by email, phone, or WhatsApp.

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Custom orders are typically delivered within 4 to 6 weeks depending on the complexity of the project.
faq.a2: Yes, we accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unworn items.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept credit cards, mobile money, and bank transfers via Flutterwave.
faq.a4: Yes, we ship throughout West Africa and beyond. Shipping fees vary depending on the destination.
faq.q5: How do I take my measurements?
faq.a5: Check out our complete measurement guide on the custom order page. You can also send us your measurements via WhatsApp.

email_detail: For orders, styling questions and support.
phone_detail: Best for urgent delivery or fitting questions.
location_detail: Appointments and atelier coordination by request.
response_text: We review every request before replying.
secure_text: Measurements and contact information stay confidential.
whatsapp_text: Send references, measurements or delivery questions directly.
hero_image_caption: Questions about sizing, delivery, custom orders or availability are handled directly by the team.
form_intro: Tell us what you need. A precise message helps us answer faster.
